commandsRun: cd /Users/feuvan/src/abyssfire && npx vitest run src/__tests__/QuestCardUI.test.ts src/__tests__/QuestTrackerHUD.test.ts src/__tests__/QuestUXIntegration.test.ts src/__tests__/QuestNPCIndicators.test.ts

assertions.reason: Command-level evidence confirms NPC interaction routes actionable quest NPCs to the compact quest card and card data includes name, description, objectives, and rewards.

Quest acceptance flow is covered by integration tests and UIScene action handling: accepting triggers QuestSystem.acceptQuest, shows an acceptance toast, and closes the compact card while the tracker then renders the active quest.
Completed quest turn-in state is covered by tests and code: the card renders as turn-in with completed objectives, rewards are granted on turn-in, and the turn-in toast is built.
Multiple quests from one NPC are prioritized and navigable: tests verify turn-in-first ordering and UIScene renders arrow controls plus a counter when more than one quest entry is present.
Unit tests explicitly cover kill, collect, explore, talk, escort, defend, investigate, and craft quest objective labels and verify valid card/tracker data for all quest types.

Story lore access is wired through the compact quest card: card data carries hasLore, UIScene renders a '查看故事' button when dialogue tree content exists, and clicking it opens dialogue separately from quest acceptance.
Quest tracker HUD is created persistently in UIScene on the right side below the minimap, and tests verify active quests render tracker entries with names and progress summaries during gameplay.

Real-time tracker updates are evidenced by integration and unit tests showing progress summary changes as objective counts change, plus UIScene marks the tracker dirty on quest events for immediate refresh.
Tracker supports compact and expandable states: progress summary is always shown, objective lines only render for expanded quest IDs, and title hit areas toggle expansion.
Completed quests show a distinct completion indicator and turn-in hint: tracker entries append a checkmark, use completed styling, and the progress summary text is '已完成 - 返回NPC交付'.

frictions.description: Validation contract asks for screenshot/console evidence for several quest UI assertions, but mission guidance explicitly prohibited browser validation and limited this run to command-only evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used focused unit/integration tests plus UIScene/source inspection as the allowed user-surface substitute and documented console evidence as not applicable.

summary: Validated VAL-QUEST-001 through VAL-QUEST-010 via command-only evidence. Focused quest UI tests passed (134/134), TypeScript check passed, and production build succeeded.
